name: Neri Shiro Miso (White Miso Dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the miso, sugar, and sake in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove pan from heat and quickly beat in 2 egg yolks, one at a time.
5. Immediately dip the bottom of the pan in ice water to cool rapidly.
6. The dressing may be used in Nuta-ae, Nasu Karashi Sumiso-ae, or Kinome-ae.
